overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a dystopian city street during a severe orange-tinted dust storm. The player navigates past pedestrians and vehicles, moving under highway overpasses and past industrial buildings with severely limited visibility.

events.description: passing a large parked truck on the left side of the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk through heavy dust storm, navigating around pedestrians and obstacles

notable_agents.action: walking ahead carrying a large bag
large commercial truck parked along the curb

entered.detail: tall pole with traffic signals at the intersection
dark colored commercial truck parked on the street side
elevated highway overpass visible through the haze in the distance
modern street lamp along the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at a city intersection during a severe dust storm with orange-tinted haze. The player walks along a concrete sidewalk, passing a pedestrian with a bag and navigating around a large parked truck. An overpass structure is visible ahead through the thick atmospheric haze.

events.description: entering the covered area beneath the overpass structure
vehicle with headlights on passes by on the right side of the road

agents.ego_description: walking under the overpass where the dust density is slightly reduced, continuing forward

notable_agents.action: car driving slowly through the dust with headlights illuminated

entered.detail: metal framework structure of the overpass overhead
thick concrete pillar supporting the overpass deck
road sign mounted on a pole near the intersection

segments.scene_description: The player enters a semi-covered area beneath a large highway overpass, providing slight shelter from the dust storm. The lighting becomes darker under the structure. A car with headlights on passes by on the right as the player continues walking beneath the metal truss framework.

events.description: exiting the overpass back into the open dust storm environment
approaching a street corner with a prominent palm tree

agents.ego_description: walking past industrial buildings and other pedestrians while approaching a street corner

notable_agents.action: person in red pants walking alongside the player
group of pedestrians walking ahead in the distance through the haze

entered.detail: low-rise concrete industrial building with small windows
concrete wall covered with colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall palm tree at the upcoming street corner
industrial waste containers with yellow lids

segments.scene_description: Exiting the overpass, the player returns to the open dust storm environment and walks past an industrial building with graffiti-covered walls. The sidewalk is lined with yellow dumpsters and other pedestrians. A tall palm tree becomes visible ahead at the street corner.

scene_state.functional_zone: street corner with billboards and second overpass

events.description: turning right at the street corner with the palm tree
entering beneath the second overpass structure

agents.ego_description: turning the corner and continuing along the new street, passing groups of pedestrians before entering another overpass

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera through the dust
car driving down the street with headlights visible through the haze

entered.detail: large commercial billboard with illuminated advertisements
second elevated highway structure visible ahead through the storm
road barrier along the edge of the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The player turns right at the corner, passing the palm tree and walking along a new street with large billboards on the left. Groups of pedestrians walk toward the camera through the thick dust. The player approaches and enters a second highway overpass as the video ends.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through a dystopian city street, moving from an open, orange-tinted dust storm into the shelter of highway overpasses. It begins at a city intersection where the camera navigates a concrete sidewalk past a pedestrian and a large parked truck amidst thick atmospheric haze. As the player moves forward, the scene shifts into the darker, semi-covered environment beneath a metal truss overpass, where a car with glowing headlights passes by. The camera then emerges back into the blinding orange storm, passing graffiti-covered industrial walls and yellow dumpsters before reaching a tall palm tree at a street corner. Finally, the view turns right toward a row of large billboards and oncoming pedestrians before entering a second highway overpass.
